model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

frame.objective: Validate or reject the DKR-P11A replayable-empty attribution checkpoint.

allowed: Replay the immutable analyzer once and compare byte-for-byte.
forbidden: Edit, drop unresolved samples, infer stacks, observe new profiles, optimize, commit, push, merge, release, publish, or deploy.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human may change targets or authority.

assignment: Run one byte-for-byte replay. Verify 36 allocation hashes, four affected profiles, 36 unresolved samples, 283064 unresolved sampled bytes, and the fail-closed empty conclusion. Reject any stack location or causality claim.
hand_back_rule: Reject missing, contradicted, non-replayable, or wrong-source evidence. Do not repair.
output_schema: Compact validator audit file under /tmp with hash and accepted/rejected counts.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
